title: brachystylus cristatus
intro: Brachystylus cristatus, also known as the climbing fern, is a type of tropical plant species belonging to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brachystylus cristatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Brachystylus cristatus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and has been used in traditional herbal remedies in various parts of the world.
